name: workflow
description: Reusable Codex workflow skills maintained from the my-codex repository.

interface.shortDescription: Use reusable workflow skills maintained in my-codex.
interface.longDescription: Workflow packages reusable Codex procedures for continuation-ready long-running goals with frozen YOLO non-stops and runtime hard stops, SOP harnesses, prompt/strategy loops, explicit subagent orchestration, scoped HTML summaries, and other repeatable agent workflows installable from the my-codex marketplace.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use my reusable Codex workflow skills.
